eligibility_policy.route_rationale: Secondary participant-facing route because it is an accepted, auto-promotable nightly stress D0 route with strong within-cohort replay and stable governance.

audience_contract.interpretation_scope: longitudinal weekly stress or next-day burden interpretation on top of approved nightly routes
allowed_claims: dominant night domains inside the weekly window
observed links with next-day burden inside the same weekly window
disallowed_claims: causal statements about a single week
escalation_guidance: use a professional review surface when the weekly pattern needs interpretation in care or research context
do not treat the participant layer as a substitute for clinical assessment

shift_vs_baseline.display_name: Sleep score overall z-score vs 7-night reference

nights_worth_reviewing.label: Most shifted night
nights_worth_reviewing.reason: largest baseline-relative deviation across the main drivers in this window

nights_worth_reviewing.label: Most stable night
nights_worth_reviewing.reason: closest to the recent participant reference across the main drivers

nights_worth_reviewing.label: Highest burden follow-up
nights_worth_reviewing.reason: night linked to the highest observed burden inside the weekly window

nights_worth_reviewing.label: Night with the weakest signal
nights_worth_reviewing.reason: night most constrained by missingness or signal quality

what_this_does_not_mean: This report is not a diagnosis and should not be read as a disease-risk statement.
This weekly view summarizes repeated patterns, not a single-night truth.
This first participant-facing report is currently limited to the same-day stress burden frame over route PMData D0 contextual interpretation.
what_to_keep_tracking: Keep tracking repeated daily burden on the same scale so that night-to-day links stay comparable.
Continue tracking awakenings, wake after sleep onset, or any sleep-fragmentation proxy available in the cohort.
Nightly cardiovascular signal remains informative here, so HR / HRV consistency should keep being captured.

headline: Within this weekly window, the clearest repeated departure from the participant baseline appeared in sleep continuity under the same-day stress burden frame, with the overall week reading as clearly shifted.
participant_summary_paragraphs: This weekly readout is based on 7 usable nights and 7 matched day reports. The current confidence label is moderate confidence.
The strongest repeated night pattern was concentrated in sleep continuity, which surfaced across 7 nights in the current window.
This week did not yet contain a repeated night-to-day pattern strong enough to support a firmer burden statement.
